case_title: HCI SYSTEMS, INC. VS. KARMA & DHARMA INVESTMENTS LLC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HCI SYSTEMS, INC.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $125. SERVED NOV-17-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KARMA & DHARMA INVESTMENTS LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2024 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,201.50 FILED BY HCI SYSTEMS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KARMA & DHARMA INVESTMENTS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-03-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-03-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF HCI SYSTEMS, INC. REPRESENTED BY REGIONAL VP ERIC NEESMITH AND RON TILTON ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT KARMA & DHARMA INVESTMENTS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HCI SYSTEMS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KARMA & DHARMA INVESTMENTS LLC $4,201.50 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,376.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
